pi_items.source: Task description: 'Create a new collection named "History of Computing"'
Task description: 'Add the tag "classic-era" (exact spelling, all lowercase)'
Task description: 'Identify all papers in your library published BEFORE 1970'
Code analysis: CLASSIC_PAPERS array in seed_library.py contains exactly 10 papers, all published before 1970 (years: 1905, 1936, 1936, 1948, 1949, 1950, 1952, 1953, 1959, 1960)
Code analysis: ML_PAPERS array in seed_library.py contains exactly 8 papers, all published in 2010s-2020s (years: 2012, 2014, 2015, 2016, 2016, 2017, 2019, 2020)

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic Zotero library seeded with 10 pre-1970 classic papers (including seminal works by Einstein, Turing, Shannon, Church, Watson/Crick, Dijkstra, McCarthy, and Huffman) and 8 modern machine learning papers (2012-2020, including Attention Is All You Need, BERT, ImageNet, and AlphaGo papers). The agent must tag all pre-1970 papers with 'classic-era' and add them to a collection named 'History of Computing', while excluding all post-1970 papers. The cutoff year 1970 cleanly separates the two datasets.
